title: fumaria parviflora var. indica
intro: Fumaria parviflora var. indica is a variety of the Fumaria parviflora plant, which is a flowering plant in the fumitory family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Fumaria parviflora var. indica include its ability to treat coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in urination. Fumaria parviflora var. indica can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is often used in herbal medicine in its raw form, or in capsule or tincture form.
